blocking_findings.consequence: The mandatory exact V1.3.2 new-43 test gate cannot pass from the exact frozen package on Node1/Python3.11.14. Therefore an exact 102+43 PASS receipt is impossible for these bytes and Stage A cannot be approved.
blocking_findings.evidence: Running the exact frozen launchers/run_tests_v1_3_2.sh against the frozen package returns nonzero: Ran 43 tests; failures=2, errors=1.
blocking_findings.root_cause: FinalizationLifecycleTests.fixture copies ROOT after the production freeze and sidecar exist, includes both in implementation/package file enumeration, and then appends and overwrites the same two paths. The synthetic allowlist contains two duplicates and validate_package_closure fails with package_allowlist before the intended assertions.

claim_boundary: Independent implementation/freeze review only. This rejection carries no model-quality, enrichment, binding, blocking, Kd, Docking Gold, Top7500, or production-promotion claim. No training occurred.

required_successor_action.minimal_repair: Make the finalization test fixture construct its synthetic implementation allowlist independently of any already-present production freeze/sidecar, then add a regression that runs the exact test launcher from the fully frozen package.
required_gates: new immutable freeze and exact sidecar
fresh local post-freeze exact test run
fresh Node1 Python 3.11.14 exact legacy102 plus successor technical suite
separate independent Stage-A-only approval outside the frozen package
